zh.lifeSummary: 當Anselm Marshal於大約1150年出生在英國威爾斯布洛可爾布洛可時，他的父親John FitzGilbert46歲，母親Sibyl de Salisbury25歲。他和Alicia of Pembroke至少有1個兒子。他去世於1245年12月22日在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾坡斯托福享年96歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾特特 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Marshal
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Marshall  .

variants.name: Marshall
meanings: English: usually an occupational name ‘farrier’, occasionally a status name ‘chief official of a royal household or court; a high officer of state’, from Middle English mareshal and Old French maresc(h)al. An even wider range of meanings is found in some other languages: compare for example Polish Marszałek (see Marszalek ). This name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century. It is also borne by Jews, presumably as an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: Anselm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, a compound of ans ‘divinity’ + helm ‘helmet’. It was brought from Italy to England by St Anselm , who was Archbishop of Canterbury in the late 11th and early 12th centuries, and is regarded as one of the Doctors of the Church. The name is now relatively infrequent and used mainly by Roman Catholics.

en.lifeSummary: When Anselm Marshal was born about 1150, in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, John FitzGilbert, was 46 and his mother, Sibyl de Salisbury, was 25. He had at least 1 son with Alicia of Pembroke. He died on 22 December 1245, in Chepstow, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 96, and was buried in Tintern Abbey, Tintern, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Anselm Marshalが約1150年にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアペンブロクで生まれた時，父John FitzGilbertは46歳，母Sibyl de Salisburyは25歳であった。彼はAlicia of Pembrokeとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1245年12月22日にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアチェプストウで96歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアティンテルンティンテルン アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anselm Marshal(이)가 대략 1150년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 p브로크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John FitzGilbert(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibyl de Salisbury(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Alicia of Pembroke(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1245년 12월 22일 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 체프스타우에서 96세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 틴터 틴터 애브브이에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anselm Marshal родился около 1150 г. в местности пемброк, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John FitzGilbert было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibyl de Salisbury, 25. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Alicia of Pembroke. Он умер 22 декабря 1245 г. в местности чепстоу, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 96 лет и был похоронен в местности тинтирн эбби, тинтирн, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания.
